name: Duchess Potato Puff
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Grease a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
In a medium saucepan, heat water, margarine, and salt until boiling. Remove from heat and stir in milk and potato flakes. Add egg, sour cream, and cheese; mix thoroughly. Pour into prepared casserole. Bake for 20-30 minutes or until lightly golden brown and puffed. Refrigerate leftovers.
